text.title: User Story Mapping Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes the BA from map-state signal to the active rule.

conclusion.verdict: split map by persona or product line

branch.question: Every activity has at least one R1 story?

conclusion.verdict: add R1 story per missing activity

branch.question: Every story carries persona_id from inventory?

conclusion.verdict: tag stories with persona_id from inventory

text.example: activities=2 ≤8 → R1 per activity → persona_id present everywhere → bands R1+R2 → commit (r3).
